chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1791 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 23.08.2022 Mr. Mir Shahzad Ahmed Talpur advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- Petitioner is PW and owner of a shop subjected to robbery on 03.12.2020 by the accused,found only in investigation and challaned accordingly in terms of report u/s 173 Cr.P.C. Petitioner’scase here is for reinvestigation. However, in the course of arguments it has transpired that the trial is in progress and one witness has been examined. Faced with the same, learned counsel does not press this petition and states that he will avail remedy either by filing a direct complaint or moving an appropriate application including an application u/s 193 Cr.P.C. for joining the accused who were let off by the investigating officer. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
